subcodes.first_line: O restless one! Behold that luminous countenance and offer a hundred thousand thanks with every breath, for thou hast become the companion of them that love the face of the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پریشان آنروی تابان صد هزار شکر در هر دمی نما که همدم عاشقان روی جانان گشتی
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
